title: 'Resumption of hostilities': seized ship, vessel attacks push U.S.-Iran ceasefire toward brink
summary_full: A U.S. seizure of an Iranian cargo ship and reports of vessels coming under fire in the Gulf have pushed a fragile ceasefire with Tehran to the brink.
summary_public: A U.S. seizure of an Iranian cargo ship and reports of vessels coming under fire in the Gulf have pushed a fragile ceasefire with Tehran to the brink.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: seized ship, vessel attacks push U.S.-Iran ceasefire toward brink
